name: durable-ledger
description: Codex-native durable ledger and wake-pack loop for stable session framing.

interface.shortDescription: Load, compress, and reinject a durable ledger at session start
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native reference plugin for stable-frame workflows: resolve the active harness, attach to the durable ledger, compress the ledger into a wake pack, and inject that wake pack at session start.
defaultPrompt: Start by reading the current wake pack for this workspace, then continue from the latest local physics.
